title: VOID#GEIST: Deconstructing the Stealthy Multi-Stage RAT Threat
excerpt: A new multi-stage malware campaign, dubbed VOID#GEIST, is leveraging obfuscated batch scripts to deploy a trio of potent Remote Access Trojans: XWorm, AsyncRAT, and Xeno RAT. Securonix Threat Research has unveiled the intricate details of this stealthy attack chain, highlighting a significant evolution in threat actor tactics.

title: VOID#GEIST: New Multi-RAT Malware Threat Emerges
excerpt: A newly discovered malware campaign, dubbed VOID#GEIST, is leveraging sophisticated techniques to deliver a trio of potent Remote Access Trojans (RATs). Security teams need to understand this multi-stage attack to protect their environments.
